
# Introduction {-}

## Purpose{-}


## Vision Statement  {-}


## Scope  {-}



## Focal Species {-}

### Anadromous Salmon {-}

### Chinook Salmon | Kekèsu | Oncorhynchus tshawytscha {-}

### Coho Salmon | Sxeyqs | Oncorhynchus kisutch  {-}

### Sockeye Salmon | Sqlelten7ùwi | Oncorhynchus nerka  {-}

## Barrier Types {-}

## Road-stream Crossings {-}


## Lateral Barriers {-}


## Small Dams (<3 m height) {-}


## Trail-stream Crossings {-}


## Natural Barriers {-}
